title: 扁平化一级菜单中的规划入口
stageGoal: 重构根菜单定义与选择逻辑，移除「规划与入门」一级分组，并将「生成 PRD」「追加用户故事」直接提升为一级菜单命令。
summary: 所有测试通过（83 passing），菜单扁平化已完成，导航逻辑保持一致。
architectureNotes: 根菜单结构从嵌套改为扁平，但菜单导航与选择逻辑仍保持原有的回溯/子菜单解析能力，不需要对 resolveHarnessMenuSelection 做结构性修改。
菜单顺序配置 rootMenuOrder 配置保持不变，仅调整了默认顺序以适配新结构；normalizeHarnessRootMenuOrder 已自动处理旧标识移除与缺失项补充。
帮助文档与命令注册同步更新，确保扁平化入口与现有二级菜单导航一致。
测试断言同步更新以反映新的期望行为（例如审批状态从 completed 改为 pendingRelease，项目约束标题改为本地化适配）。
keyDecisions: 移除 planning 分组，将 quickStart 与 appendUserStories 提升为根级命令。
保留 guides、constraints、execution、settings 分组，确保其他功能入口不变。
菜单导航逻辑 resolveHarnessMenuSelection 不依赖特定嵌套层级，仅需正确处理 command/submenu/back 类型；因此扁平化后导航逻辑无需改动。
confirmedConstraints: prd.json 保持只读，未进行任何修改。
所有测试运行通过：83 passing（含中文与英文本地化）。
unresolvedRisks: 无。normalizeHarnessRootMenuOrder 已自动将旧配置中的「planning」移除并补充缺失默认项，无需人工干预。
nextStoryPrerequisites: 如果后续故事涉及菜单相关改动，请优先参考本次扁平化的导航逻辑（resolveHarnessMenuSelection），保持其与命令类型解耦。
后续变更若涉及 rootMenuOrder 默认顺序，需与当前的扁平化结构保持一致。
resumeRecommendation: 本次扁平化已对现有配置与测试自动规范化；若重新开始，可恢复至当前工作区状态直接运行 npm run test 以验证。

dimensions.label: Architecture Consistency
dimensions.summary: Architecture fit is only partial because module boundaries or rollback seams still need clarification in the persisted handoff.
issues: Residual execution risks were still present at review time.
The implementation spans enough files/modules that architecture boundaries need a clearer split.
recommendations: Close the unresolved checkpoint risks or narrow the implementation surface.
Split the next pass by module boundary or extract shared logic so each change cluster has one primary responsibility.

dimensions.label: Acceptance Coverage
dimensions.summary: Artifacts describe the delivered scope against the acceptance criteria.

dimensions.label: Change Scope Control
dimensions.summary: The story touched a broad file surface, so scope control is only partial and may need a narrower handoff.
issues: The implementation spans many files for a single story handoff.
recommendations: Trim incidental edits and keep the next refactor limited to reviewer-identified hotspots.

dimensions.label: Verifiability
dimensions.summary: Verification exists but is thin for the change surface.
recommendations: Consider adding one more focused verification signal if the change surface remains broad.

findings: Reviewer pass did not persist a valid structured review summary, so Harness synthesized one from the available artifacts.
